description: Translate the 056 + 058 cli-devin SWE 1.6 deep-loop retrospective into actionable updates across 6 surfaces: extend /spec_kit:deep-research + /spec_kit:deep-review executor enum to include cli-devin; add SWE-1.6-specific iter contract sections to @deep-research + @deep-review agents and to cli-devin/SKILL.md; author 2 new cli-devin references (deep-loop-iter-contract, agent-config-recipes) and 3 new assets (iter template + 2 SWE-1.6-locked agent-config JSONs for --agent-config flag).
